studies.title: Vitamin D supplementation and serum 25(OH)D in adults with low sun exposure
studies.summary: 1000-2000 IU/day reliably raises serum 25(OH)D into the sufficient range over 8 weeks.

studies.title: Marine n-3 fatty acids and cardiovascular endpoints
studies.summary: Marine omega-3s associated with modest reduction in major cardiovascular events.

studies.title: Magnesium supplementation and subjective sleep quality
studies.summary: Modest improvements in self-reported sleep onset and quality at 200-400 mg/day.

studies.title: B12 status in vegan adults
studies.summary: Vegans without supplementation show high prevalence of B12 deficiency; supplementation normalizes serum B12.
